prompt: Say: I like to play football with my friends.
correctAnswer: Me gusta jugar al fútbol con mis amigos.

prompt: football / swimming / running / cycling
correctAnswer: natación
hints: Which sport is done in water?

prompt: Say: I go running every morning.
correctAnswer: Salgo a correr cada mañana.

prompt: a swimming pool
correctAnswer: una piscina
hints: Where you swim indoors or outdoors.

prompt: Say: I play basketball at school.
correctAnswer: Juego al baloncesto en el colegio.
hints: 'Jugar a + sport'; use 'al' before a masculine sport noun.

prompt: Say: She rides a bicycle every day.
correctAnswer: Ella monta en bicicleta todos los días.
hints: 'Montar en bicicleta' = to ride a bike.

prompt: a gym
correctAnswer: un gimnasio
hints: A place with weights and exercise machines.

prompt: Say: I do not like to run.
correctAnswer: No me gusta correr.

prompt: Which is a team sport?
correctAnswer: voleibol
hints: It needs two teams of six players.

prompt: Say: We play tennis on Saturdays.
correctAnswer: Jugamos al tenis los sábados.

prompt: Say: I train at the gym three times a week.
correctAnswer: Me entreno en el gimnasio tres veces a la semana.

prompt: What does 'to warm up' mean?
correctAnswer: preparar el cuerpo antes del ejercicio
hints: Think about what you do before exercising.
options: preparar el cuerpo antes del ejercicio

prompt: Say: My favourite sport is tennis and I play it on weekends.
correctAnswer: Mi deporte favorito es el tenis y lo practico los fines de semana.
hints: Combine a preference with a habit.

prompt: to cool down (after exercise)
correctAnswer: enfriarse
hints: The slow phase after intense exercise to bring your heart rate down.

prompt: Say: I started going to the gym last month.
correctAnswer: Empecé a ir al gimnasio el mes pasado.

prompt: Say: He plays in a local football team.
correctAnswer: Juega en un equipo de fútbol local.

prompt: Say: Swimming is good for your back.
correctAnswer: La natación es buena para la espalda.
hints: Use 'la + sport' when referring to it in general.

prompt: Say: I prefer cycling to running.
correctAnswer: Prefiero el ciclismo a correr.

prompt: Choose the best response. Your friend asks: Do you play any sport?
correctAnswer: Sí, nado dos veces a la semana.
hints: State the sport and how often.

prompt: Say: We won the match three to one.
correctAnswer: Ganamos el partido tres a uno.

prompt: Say: She has been training for the marathon for six months.
correctAnswer: Lleva seis meses entrenando para el maratón.
hints: Use present tense with duration for an ongoing action.

prompt: Say: Regular exercise improves both physical and mental health.
correctAnswer: El ejercicio regular mejora tanto la salud física como la mental.

prompt: What does 'to set a personal best' mean?
correctAnswer: lograr tu mejor resultado de siempre
options: lograr tu mejor resultado de siempre

prompt: stamina
correctAnswer: resistencia
hints: The ability to keep exercising for a long time without tiring.

prompt: Say: Stretching after exercise helps prevent muscle soreness.
correctAnswer: Estirar después del ejercicio ayuda a prevenir el dolor muscular.

prompt: Say: The coach told us to increase our training intensity.
correctAnswer: El entrenador nos dijo que aumentáramos la intensidad del entrenamiento.
hints: 'Decir que' + imperfect subjunctive for reported command.

prompt: Say: I had to withdraw from the competition due to an injury.
correctAnswer: Tuve que retirarme de la competición por una lesión.

prompt: Say: Running a marathon requires months of dedicated preparation.
correctAnswer: Correr un maratón requiere meses de preparación dedicada.

prompt: Choose the best response. Your teammate says: I pulled a muscle.
correctAnswer: Tienes que descansar y aplicarte hielo.
hints: Give two pieces of practical advice.

prompt: Say: I prefer team sports because they keep me motivated.
correctAnswer: Prefiero los deportes de equipo porque me mantienen motivado.

prompt: Say: Elite athletes must balance intense training with adequate recovery time.
correctAnswer: Los atletas de élite deben equilibrar el entrenamiento intenso con un tiempo de recuperación adecuado.

prompt: Say: The physiotherapist advised him to reduce his training load temporarily.
correctAnswer: El fisioterapeuta le aconsejó reducir temporalmente su carga de entrenamiento.

prompt: Say: The sponsorship deal transformed the club's financial prospects.
correctAnswer: El acuerdo de patrocinio transformó las perspectivas financieras del club.
hints: Use past tense for a completed event.

prompt: overtraining syndrome
correctAnswer: síndrome de sobreentrenamiento
hints: What happens when an athlete trains too much without enough rest.

prompt: Say: Performance-enhancing drugs undermine the integrity of sport.
correctAnswer: Las sustancias para mejorar el rendimiento socavan la integridad del deporte.

prompt: Say: The athlete's mental resilience was as important as her physical conditioning.
correctAnswer: La resiliencia mental de la atleta era tan importante como su estado físico.

prompt: Say: The federation announced stricter doping controls ahead of the championship.
correctAnswer: La federación anunció controles antidopaje más estrictos antes del campeonato.

prompt: What does 'periodización' refer to in sports training?
correctAnswer: the systematic planning of training cycles to peak performance at the right time
hints: Athletes and coaches use it to avoid fatigue before key competitions.
options: the systematic planning of training cycles to peak performance at the right time

prompt: Choose the best response. An interviewer asks: How do you cope with the pressure of major tournaments?
correctAnswer: Trabajo con un psicólogo deportivo para gestionar la ansiedad antes de competir.

prompt: Say: Investment in grassroots sport creates long-term societal benefits.
correctAnswer: La inversión en el deporte de base genera beneficios sociales a largo plazo.
culturalNote: España ha producido atletas olímpicos de élite en deportes como el tenis, el ciclismo y la natación.
